rationale: Lockfile-only bump of jwcrypto from 1.5.6 to 1.5.7 in enterprise/poetry.lock, with corresponding wheel and sdist hash updates. The PR body openly discloses that the advisory does not list an official 'fixed version' yet and that 1.5.7 was chosen as the latest available release, so this is a best-effort speculative upgrade rather than a confirmed CVE fix — but the diff itself is exactly what the body describes, with no inflated claim that the CVE is resolved. The only incidental edits (python-versions string whitespace normalization and typing-extensions → typing_extensions in the dependency line) are normal artifacts of poetry lock regeneration.
